Sweet client but she doesn’t take care of her lashes. Very poor retention…I asked her a few questions about her after care regimen and she admitted to not washing. I went over proper after care, and recommended her to use our lash cleanser and showed her how to use it. Hopefully she’ll take the advice and have better retention moving fwd. I did the same mapping as her last appointment.

Hybrid full open eye style 

Previous map looked like 
12|14| 15 |14|12 so I followed that with hand made fans 

Previous retention was not good she barley had lashes on the right eye and the premade made fans were all  closed and greasy tried to do a through wash to help let client know to wash lashes atleast once a day and recommended a lash serum that works with extensions like the one we have
8/9/23 Appointment today was scheduled as a 2-Week Fill, but she is due for a 3-Week. I emailed her to let her know and I changed the appointment. AH

Glue numbers 3 .

I asked her to book volume for her next appointment
